Notes: Any nice!nano compatible board should work, check pcb footprint though
You can get a different IMU, but you have to code the sensor fusion code yourself
Make sure you get the right length (6x6x7)
Make sure you get the right connector (right angle)
Make sure you get the PS4 style joystick
Do not substitute for regular clicky buttons, they are not the same footprint
Really anything works here so long as it meets the 5mm thick, up to 35mm by 80mm dimension requirement and has a jst ph 2.0 connector
Link is to gerber files, JLC ships the total for 3.50 to Canada
Price differs based on filament. Bambu Lab PLA Matte is used here
